basic_details.job_title: DCPU Tiruppur Case Worker Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit Tiruppur (DCPU Tiruppur) Case Worker Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Tiruppur District. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DCPU Tiruppur Case Worker Recruitment 2026 on a contractual basis.

qualification.education_qualification: 12th passed from a recognized Board / Equivalent Board
qualification.details: Case Worker: 12th passed from a recognized Board / Equivalent Board. Good Communication Skills. Weightage for experienced candidate. Preference may be given to personnel working in Emergency Helplines.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://tiruppur.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download DCPU Tiruppur Case Worker Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download DCPU Tiruppur Case Worker Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DCPU Tiruppur Case Worker Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://tiruppur.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DCPU Tiruppur Case Worker Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Tiruppur Case Worker recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Case Worker post is 06-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Case Worker position?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed the 12th grade from a recognized Board or an equivalent board to be eligible for the Case Worker role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Case Worker post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Case Worker position will receive a salary of Rs. 18,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the DCPU Tiruppur Case Worker job?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the DCPU Tiruppur Case Worker recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Case Worker role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Case Worker post primarily involves Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Case Worker post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Case Worker position in the District Child Protection Unit Tiruppur.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any preferences given to certain candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, weightage will be given to experienced candidates, and preference may be given to personnel working in Emergency Helplines.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Tiruppur District, which is https://tiruppur.nic.in.
